examples: The streets in Switzerland were cleaner and emptier than those at home.
Many of ESL's ships leave Africa emptier than when they arrived, but that is changing.
It shows up in rural Malaysia in richer, emptier villages surrounded by mechanised farms.
And there's a void in shops too which seem to be getting emptier.
Because little research, and even less development, has happened since, the pipeline of good ideas is getting steadily emptier.
